message:
ci: move caut to stable toolchain to avoid nightly ICE

- switch rust-toolchain and CI jobs to stable channel
- update AGENTS guidance to reflect stable 1.88+ requirement

Co-Authored-By: Codex <noreply@openai.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           key: ${{ matrix.os }}
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Install cargo-audit
         run: cargo install cargo-audit
@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: llvm-tools-preview
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Build release
         run: cargo build --release --all-features

@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ If I tell you to do something, even if it goes against what follows below, YOU M
 
 We only use **Cargo** in this project, NEVER any other package manager.
 
-- **Edition:** Rust 2024 (nightly required — see `rust-toolchain.toml`)
+- **Edition:** Rust 2024 (stable 1.88+ — see `rust-toolchain.toml`)
 - **Dependency versions:** Explicit versions for stability
 - **Configuration:** Cargo.toml only
 - **Unsafe code:** Forbidden (`#![forbid(unsafe_code)]`)
